name: Suno AI
tagline: AI music generator that turns any idea into a full song instantly
description: Suno AI is the leading AI music generation platform that creates full songs from text prompts, widely used by game developers for generating soundtracks, ambient music, and battle themes. With version 5 in 2025, Suno reached a point where listeners can't distinguish AI-generated songs from human-made ones, making it invaluable for indie game studios needing original music.
creator: Suno

name: Blackshark.ai
tagline: AI-powered photorealistic 3D environments from satellite imagery
description: Blackshark.ai transforms global satellite and aerial imagery into structured, photorealistic 3D models of the physical world using AI. Its Globe Plugin for Unreal Engine enables game developers and simulation creators to stream real-world environments at runtime, creating massive open-world maps from actual geography.
creator: Blackshark.ai

name: CSM
tagline: AI-enhanced 3D character modeling and animation tools
description: CSM (Common Sense Machines) provides AI tools that simplify 3D character modeling and animation for game developers. It converts 2D images into detailed 3D character models with proper topology and textures, dramatically reducing the time needed for character creation in game production pipelines.
creator: CSM

name: Anything World
tagline: Voice-powered 3D creation platform for games and virtual worlds
description: Anything World is an accessible 3D creation platform powered by voice commands and AI, enabling developers to create and animate 3D objects by simply describing them. It democratizes 3D asset creation for game developers who can generate, rig, and animate characters and props through natural language.
creator: Anything World

name: Genies
tagline: AI avatar platform with emotionally intelligent digital companions
description: Genies lets users create and chat with AI avatars, explore celebrity characters, and build digital identities. In 2025 it partnered with Unity to bring emotionally intelligent AI avatars into games, merging behavior, personality, and cross-platform adaptability for gaming, VR, AR, and metaverse experiences.
creator: Genies

name: Runway
tagline: AI-powered video generation and editing for game trailers and content
description: Runway is a powerful AI video generation and editing platform widely used in gaming for creating trailers, cutscenes, and promotional content. Its generative AI tools enable game studios to produce cinematic-quality video content from text prompts, dramatically reducing production time and costs for marketing assets.
creator: Runway

name: Brickwise
tagline: AI property manager that automates maintenance for landlords
description: Brickwise is a YC-backed AI property manager that automates maintenance requests, handling tenant calls and messages 24/7, then follows up by chasing contractors and resolving issues. Based in London with customers from San Francisco to Dubai, it has raised over $3M and secured a >$1M ARR enterprise contract within 6 months of formation.
creator: Brickwise

name: IronLedger
tagline: AI-powered property accounting and expense management
description: IronLedger automates property accounting for property managers, developers, and contractors, starting with accounts payable. Backed by Y Combinator, it eliminates more than $70K of accounting costs annually for over 50K multifamily units, with AI agents handling expense management and invoice processing for real estate portfolios.
creator: IronLedger

name: RealReports
tagline: AI-powered property intelligence platform for real estate agents
description: RealReports is an AI-powered property intelligence platform trusted by leading MLSs and brokerages, securing 50+ deals in 2025 alone. It provides agents with comprehensive property reports and launched 'Pulse' in December 2025, an AI-driven client retention engine that helps modern agents stay connected with their sphere of influence.
creator: RealReports

name: D-ID
tagline: Lifelike AI video avatars for real estate and customer engagement
description: D-ID is the best AI avatar generator combining lifelike video avatars with real-time interactive agents. In 2025, Microsoft integrated D-ID's agentic AI avatars into its communications platform, and real estate companies use D-ID to create virtual property agents that can engage prospects with natural, human-like video conversations.
creator: D-ID

name: Enodo
tagline: AI-powered multifamily underwriting and due diligence
description: Enodo uses predictive analytics and machine learning to model rent, estimate expenses, and assess amenity impacts on revenue for multifamily real estate. It streamlines the underwriting and due diligence process, helping investors and lenders make data-driven decisions with AI-powered property valuation models.
creator: Enodo (HelloData)

name: Freshflow
tagline: AI-powered fresh food supply chain optimization for grocery retailers
description: Freshflow is the first AI platform in Europe built for grocery retailers' fresh departments, raising €6.5M in 2025. It optimizes the fresh food supply chain with precise demand forecasting for every product in every store, handling messy data and unreliable inventories to eliminate food waste across the entire supply chain.
creator: Freshflow

name: OAASIS
tagline: Modular AI-powered end-to-end supply chain optimization
description: OAASIS is a Dutch scale-up providing a modular, AI-powered platform that delivers end-to-end supply chain optimization for consumer goods companies. Raised €2.9M in 2025, it focuses on SMEs to mid-market firms, offering planning tools that handle any complexity in supply chains with AI-driven decision support.
creator: OAASIS

name: FlockScore
tagline: AI-driven supplier performance and sourcing risk identification
description: FlockScore is a Belgian startup that brings together external supplier performance data to identify sourcing risks at an early stage. It addresses the growing demand for reliable sustainability and compliance information by aggregating real-time performance data with AI-driven analytics for procurement teams.
creator: FlockScore

name: Treefera
tagline: AI-native first-mile intelligence for agricultural supply chains
description: Treefera is a well-funded UK startup providing AI-native first-mile intelligence with unprecedented visibility into agricultural and soft commodity supply chains. It focuses on traceability and carbon accounting in complex supply chains, helping companies verify sustainability claims and track commodities from source to shelf.
creator: Treefera

name: foresAIght
tagline: AI demand forecasting as a service for industrial SMEs
description: foresAIght is a German startup developing AI-driven demand forecasting for medium-sized manufacturing, retail, and logistics organizations. It combines thousands of external data sources to help SMEs better cope with volatility, making advanced AI forecasting accessible to companies that previously couldn't afford enterprise solutions.
creator: foresAIght

name: 123Carbon
tagline: AI platform for transport emissions verification and carbon insetting
description: 123Carbon is a Dutch startup focused on verifying, issuing, and managing Environmental Attribute Certificates for transport emissions across multiple modes. It acts as an independent global registry enabling carbon insetting in the logistics sector, helping companies meet sustainability targets with verified emission reduction data.
creator: 123Carbon
